zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter Cartwright於大約1687年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰聖 馬也斯時，他的父親Matthew Cartwright54歲，母親Sarah Elizabeth Miller34歲。他於1714年與Judith SLYE在美國馬里蘭州查爾斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1751年6月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰查爾斯聖 馬雷斯 帕里什享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter Cartwright于大约1687年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰聖 馬也斯时，他的父亲Matthew Cartwright54岁，母亲Sarah Elizabeth Miller34岁。他于1714年与Judith SLYE在美国马里兰州查爾斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1751年6月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰查爾斯聖 馬雷斯 帕里什享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cartwright
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Midlands and northern England): occupational name from Middle English cart(e) ‘cart’ + wright(e) ‘craftsman’ (Old English cræt or Old Norse kartr + Old English wyrhta), for a cartwright, a maker of carts.
Variant of   Courtright  , a surname of Dutch origin.

variants.name: Gathright
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Cartwright  .

variants.name: Cartright
meanings: Probably also a variant of   Courtright  , a surname of Dutch origin.

variants.name: Courtright
meanings: Americanized form of Dutch Kortrijk: habitational name from the city of Kortrijk in Flanders, in French known as Courtrai. Compare Cartwright , Cortright , Courtwright , Curtright , Cutright , and Kortright .
Perhaps also an altered form of English   Cartwright  .

History: The progenitors of the (majority of the) Courtrights (and Cortrights, Kortrights, etc.) were the brothers Jan and Michiel Bastiansen van Kortryk from Leerdam in the Netherlands, who arrived with their families to New Amsterdam in New Netherland (now New York City, NY) in 1663. The descendants of one or another brother also bear the surnames Kortright, Kortwright, Cortright, Co(u)rtwright, Cartwright, and Cu(r)tright.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter Cartwright was born about 1687, in St. Mary's, Maryland, British Colonial America, his father, Matthew Cartwright, was 54 and his mother, Sarah Elizabeth Miller, was 34. He married Judith SLYE in 1714, in Charles, Maryland, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 15 June 1751, in St Marys Parish, Charles, Maryland, British Colonial America, at the age of 65.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter Cartwrightが約1687年にイギリス植民地アメリカメリーランド州スト. マリ'スで生まれた時，父Matthew Cartwrightは54歳，母Sarah Elizabeth Millerは34歳であった。1714年にアメリカ合衆国メリーランド州チャーレスでJudith SLYEと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1751年6月15日にイギリス植民地アメリカメリーランド州チャーレススト マリス パーイッシュで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter Cartwright(이)가 대략 1687년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주 스트. 마이'스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Matthew Cartwright(은)는 54세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Elizabeth Miller(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1714년 미국 메릴랜드 주 찰스에서 Judith SLYE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1751년 6월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주 찰스 스트 마이스 파리시에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Cartwright nasceu aproximadamente 1687, em St. Mary's, Maryland, British Colonial America, seu pai, Matthew Cartwright, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Elizabeth Miller, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Judith SLYE em 1714, em Charles, Marilândia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de junho de 1751, em St Marys Parish, Charles, Maryland, British Colonial America, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter Cartwright родился около 1687 г. в местности ст. мэри'с, Мэриленд, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Matthew Cartwright было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah Elizabeth Miller, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Judith SLYE в 1714 г. в местности чарльс, Мэриленд, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 15 июня 1751 г. в местности ст мэрис пэриш, чарльс, Мэриленд, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter Cartwright nació aproximadamente 1687, en St. Mary's, Maryland, British Colonial America, su papá, Matthew Cartwright, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Sarah Elizabeth Miller, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Judith SLYE en 1714, en Charles, Maryland, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 15 de junio de 1751, en St Marys Parish, Charles, Maryland, British Colonial America, a la edad de 65 años.
